description_long: This is a distorted human figure resembling an adult male, with exaggeratedly elongated and twisted arms extending far above the head. The figure is kneeling on one knee, with the other leg bent and the foot flat on the ground. The person is dressed in a sleeveless top and fitted pants, with visible shoes on both feet. The head is proportionate, but the arms and upper torso are unnaturally stretched, creating a surreal and fragmented appearance. The facial features are visible, and the hair is short and neatly styled. The overall form is humanoid but heavily deformed, likely due to mesh or rigging errors.
description: A kneeling adult male figure with extremely elongated, twisted arms and a distorted upper body, dressed in casual clothing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the kneeling pose, facial features, and the dramatic upward stretch of both arms.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extreme length and twist of the arms, as well as the bent knee and foot placement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the sleeveless top, and the arms extending outward and upward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other leg bent and the continued distortion of the arms and torso.
attribute_posture: kneeling with arms raised and twisted
